chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.S-311 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on office objection (s) 2. For hearing of main case 06.11.2025 Mr.Khalid Mustafa Shoro, Advocate for the Petitioner M/s Barrister Jawad Ahmed Qureshi and Mr.Osama Yousuf Parhyar, Advocates for the respondent No.1 ******* Heard arguments. For the reasons to be recorded, the instant petition is dismissed. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
